title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAGA CITY SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL INTO A NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4130 / 97 OG No. 18, 2571 (April 30, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8944, August 22, 2000 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAGA CITY SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL INTO A NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Naga City Science High School in Barangay Concepcion Peque√±a, Naga City is hereby nationalized to be known in its original name as the Naga City Science High School.

SEC. 2. All personnel, records, equipment, buildings, facilities and other properties of the Naga City Science High School are hereby transferred to the nationalized Naga City Science High School.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 27, 2000

and May 22, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO
